nasb.text: Then Abishai the son of Zeruiah said to the king, “Why should this dead dog curse my lord the king? Let me go over now and cut off his head.”

esv.text: Then Abishai the son of Zeruiah said to the king, “Why should this dead dog curse my lord the king? Let me go over and take off his head.”

cnv.text: 洗魯雅的兒子亞比篩對王說：“為甚麼讓這條死狗咒罵我主我王呢？讓我過去，把他的頭砍下來。”

ccb.text: 洗鲁雅的儿子亚比筛对王说：“这死狗竟敢辱骂我主我王，让我过去砍掉他的头！”
